papers.selection_reason: DETR 原始论文，定义 query-based set prediction 与端到端检测基线。
papers.title: End-to-end object detection with transformers

papers.selection_reason: 代表性改进，针对 DETR 收敛慢和多尺度小目标问题引入 deformable attention。
papers.title: Deformable DETR: deformable transformers for end-to-end object detection

papers.selection_reason: 训练/收敛问题代表，通过 denoising 与 anchor query 改善 DETR 训练稳定性。
papers.title: DINO: DETR with improved DeNoising anchor boxes for end-to-end object detection

papers.selection_reason: 检测范式扩展，把 DETR 查询机制推进到多视角 3D 检测。
papers.title: DETR3D: 3D object detection from multi-view images via 3D-to-2D queries

papers.selection_reason: 近期高相关变体，面向 real-time detection transformers 和架构搜索。
papers.title: RF-DETR: neural architecture search for real-time detection transformers

selection_policy: 从真实 model:DL/DETR resolver 结果中确定性选择 5 篇：原始 DETR、代表性改进、训练/收敛、范式扩展、近期高相关变体。
